clusters.justification: This domain encompasses the processing of emotional valence, generalized arousal, and mood regulation, which are heavily subserved by the large-scale salience and limbic cortical-subcortical architectures.

This domain represents the computation of subjective utility, motivational drive, and cost-benefit outcome processing reliably linked to the concerted co-activation of striatal and ventromedial prefrontal reward networks.

This domain unites the internally-directed abstraction of self-identity, narrative memory, and the modeling of other agents' minds, directly mapping onto the functional topology of the default mode network.
